test_cases.title: agent-pool collects toolCalls from JSONL tool_execution_start events
test_cases.description: processJsonlEvent should push { name, input } to pipeline.toolCalls for every tool_execution_start, not just structured-output
steps: Create mock JSONL event: { type: 'tool_execution_start', toolName: 'Bash', args: { command: 'git diff' } }

test_cases.title: state AgentResult includes toolCalls field
steps: Create AgentResult with toolCalls: [{ name: 'Read', input: 'file.ts' }]

test_cases.title: orchestrator maps toolCalls from pool result to state result
steps: Verify orchestrator.ts executeWithRetry result construction includes toolCalls field

test_cases.title: subscribe triggers listener on emit
test_cases.description: After subscribe, emit should synchronously call listener with event
steps: Assert listener called once with correct event

test_cases.title: unsubscribe stops listener calls
test_cases.description: After unsubscribe, emit should not trigger listener

test_cases.title: listener exception does not propagate
test_cases.description: Listener throws → other listeners and emit continue normally

test_cases.title: tick interval lifecycle
test_cases.description: Interval starts on first subscribe, stops when all unsubscribe

test_cases.title: groupByPhase groups nodes by phase field
test_cases.description: Nodes with same phase grouped together, no phase → '(no phase)'
steps: Create nodes: [{ phase: 'Review' }, { phase: 'Review' }, { phase: undefined }]
Assert Map has 'Review' with 2 nodes and '(no phase)' with 1 node

test_cases.title: formatSidebarNode truncates at width
steps: Call formatSidebarNode with long agent name, width=20

test_cases.title: formatActivityLine formats ToolName(args)
test_cases.description: Output is 'Bash(git diff ...)' format with truncation
steps: Call formatActivityLine({ name: 'Bash', input: 'git diff main...HEAD' }, 40)
Assert output starts with 'Bash(' and ends with ')'

test_cases.title: formatElapsed computes seconds from startedAt
steps: Call formatElapsed with ISO string 60s ago

test_cases.title: formatTokenStat shows token and tool call counts
test_cases.description: Returns 'N tok · M tool calls' format
steps: Call with usage={ input: 100, output: 50, turns: 1 } and toolCalls.length=3
Assert output contains '150 tok' and '3 tool calls'

test_cases.title: Full view opens via /workflows command
test_cases.description: End-to-end: /workflows → SelectList → select → fullscreen view renders
steps: Select the running workflow from list
Verify fullscreen view appears with correct layout

test_cases.title: Keyboard navigation and control
test_cases.description: Verify all keyboard shortcuts work correctly

test_cases.title: 80x24 terminal rendering
test_cases.description: Verify view renders correctly in minimum terminal size
